$comment: Vendored MEOS-API artefacts. Sources, regenerate with `make vendor-meos-api`.

meos-idl.json.describes: MEOS catalog: 3546 functions, 70 structs, 16 enums (simple parse over MobilityDB master headers). Enriched form (with `network`/`wire`/`api` fields) is delivered by open PR #4; once that PR's content reaches master, this artefact picks up the enriched form via the standard `make vendor-meos-api` fetch.

meos-coverage.json.source_branch: feat/service-enrichment (PR #4) — `report.py` is not yet on master
meos-coverage.json.describes: Structural worklist of non-exposable functions, ranked by `byClass`.

meos-object-model-parity.json.source_branch: feat/object-model (PR #10) — `object_model_parity.py` is not yet on master
meos-object-model-parity.json.describes: Object-model dispatch / portable bare-name parity (29-pair contract verbatim).

meos-openapi.json.source_path: output/meos-openapi.json (regenerated; not committed on the PR branch)
meos-openapi.json.describes: OpenAPI 3.1 projection: 1790 operations over 14 component schemas, every path a single POST with `x-meos-*` extensions. NOT YET vendored here — open PR #5's generator requires the enriched catalog from open PR #4. When both land on master, this artefact appears.

meos-movfeat-openapi.json.source_path: output/meos-movfeat-openapi.json (generated by generate_movfeat_openapi.py + generator/movfeat.py; not committed)
meos-movfeat-openapi.json.describes: OGC API – Moving Features OpenAPI projection. The contract the OGC endpoints dispatch against, per `docs/MEOS_API_INGESTION_PLAN.md`.
